creator: david@landgren.net
text:
Edwin Groothuis wrote, some time around 16/09/2009 07:50:
> Maintainer of sysutils/p5-BSD-Sysctl,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/138871 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/138871

I have reviewed the PR and approve the patch.

Thanks,
David Landgren

-- 
it's an anthem in a vacuum on a hyperstation, day dreaming days in a 
daydream nation
